required_status_contexts.name: macos
required_status_contexts.test_signal: Build and Test macOS alias over the native build matrix; this is the branch-protected product test gate.

required_status_contexts.name: Enforce version & skill sync
required_status_contexts.test_signal: Repository governance gate, not a product test suite signal.

workflows.name: Build and Test
workflows.test_signal: Primary PR build and CTest lane. Branch protection requires only the macos alias; Linux and Windows aliases are advisory unless rules change.
workflows.quality_issue: The main CTest step still carries inline exclude regex fragments; Phase 0 quarantine metadata now tracks those exclusions.

workflows.name: Build and Test (macOS retarget)
workflows.test_signal: Manual reroute for the branch-protected macos context.
workflows.quality_issue: Useful for recovery, but not a separate coverage source.

workflows.name: Coverage
workflows.test_signal: Diff coverage gate on PRs; wider platform coverage runs outside normal PR scope.
workflows.quality_issue: Coverage is a useful guardrail but must not replace behavior-first test intent.

workflows.name: Cross-platform check
workflows.test_signal: Nightly build and test backstop for non-macOS platforms, with tracking issues on failure.
workflows.quality_issue: Not a PR blocker; platform regressions can merge before the nightly reports them.

workflows.name: Nightly full build
workflows.test_signal: Full tree build with examples and all test targets to catch compile-only test rot.
workflows.quality_issue: CTest runtime results are informational, so this is primarily a build-target integrity signal.

workflows.name: Format validator baseline diff
workflows.test_signal: Path-filtered AU/VST3/CLAP validator baseline comparison for format-adapter changes.
workflows.quality_issue: Only runs on selected paths; validator health outside those paths depends on other lanes.

workflows.name: Plugin Validation
workflows.test_signal: Manual pluginval, clap-validator, auval, and CTest validation lane.
workflows.quality_issue: Manual-only and some validator invocations are tolerated with `|| true`, so it is not a trustworthy required signal yet.

workflows.name: Sanitizer Tests
workflows.quality_issue: Advisory and partly dispatch-only; failures should inform remediation but do not block normal merge.

workflows.name: Visual Harness
workflows.quality_issue: Visual evidence needs reviewed baselines and capability labels so it is not mistaken for unit coverage.

workflows.name: Android Build
workflows.test_signal: Android build and platform smoke coverage.
workflows.quality_issue: Background signal, not a release gate; emulator/JNI coverage depends on runner capability.

workflows.name: sandbox-e2e
workflows.cadence: pull_request, push main, reusable release pre-publish
workflows.quality_issue: Some build steps are allowed to continue on error; missing required binaries must be separated from optional smoke behavior.

workflows.name: Release CLI
workflows.test_signal: Release artifact build and binary smoke checks.
workflows.quality_issue: Release builds do not replace PR behavior tests; they prove ship artifacts can be built and packaged.

workflows.name: Sign and Release
workflows.test_signal: Signing, packaging, notarization, and release upload path.
workflows.quality_issue: Tests are disabled by design; this protects release mechanics, not product behavior.
